positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The peaks are sharply defined, rendered in deep indigo and charcoal gray. The sky behind the mountains features soft gradients of vibrant peach, coral, and pale gold, creating a strong contrast. A few stylized, geometric aurora borealis lines subtly weave through the upper sky. The overall style is modern vector art with a premium, screen-print aesthetic, emphasizing clean lines and solid color blocks. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print, designed with a wide, readable focal point. Clean edge profile, high contrast, illustrative, suitable for apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, bad anatomy, distorted, messy lines, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, noisy
